title: Santa Fe Scouts
writer: Betty Burbridge, Morton Grant, William Colt MacDonald
actors: Bob Steele, Tom Tyler, Jimmie Dodd
plot: The Three Mersquiteers, Tucson Smith (Bob Steele), Stony Brooke (Tom Tyler) and Lullaby Josline (Jimmie Dodd), run into trouble trying to keep Tim Clay (John James), son of their employer Minera Clay (Elizabeth Valentine), out of ...
